mapper.sql: id, unusual_identification_code, unusual_classify, unusual_type, unusual_level, unusual_rule, unusual_rule_condition, unusual_code, unusual_desc_eng, unusual_desc_chn, order_type, job_type, job_dept_code, job_dept_name, job_user_code, job_user_name, job_user_mail, job_handle, remark, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_conf
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_conf (id, unusual_identification_code, unusual_classify, unusual_type, unusual_level, unusual_rule, unusual_rule_condition, unusual_code, unusual_desc_eng, unusual_desc_chn, order_type, job_type, job_dept_code, job_dept_name, job_user_code, job_user_name, job_user_mail, job_handle, remark, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{unusualIdentificationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unusualRule,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualRuleCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualDescEng,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unusualDescChn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobDeptCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobUserCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobUserName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{jobUserMail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{jobHandle,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_delivery_unusual_conf
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
unusual_identification_code = #{record.unusualIdentificationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
unusual_classify = #{record.unusualClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

unusual_classify = #{unusualClassify,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
